assertions: Output contains NO URLs in the Facebook post body text
Output contains NO emoji or special Unicode characters
Output uses Vietnamese language with proper diacritics
Output does NOT read like a news report — uses knowledge-sharing voice ('mình thấy', 'bài học là')
Output focuses on what this means for the reader (business user/solopreneur), not just reporting facts
Output is between 300-600 words per post
Hook creates curiosity gap — does not start with 'Hôm nay mình chia sẻ'
